summary: Completed comprehensive testing of YOLO weapon detection system. All backend APIs functional, frontend UI properly rendered with tactical design, backend-frontend integration working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns correct status
Backend stats endpoint (/api/stats) returns all required fields
Backend detection endpoint (/api/detect) accepts base64 images and returns detections
Frontend Dashboard loads with correct layout and components
Header displays app title 'SENTIENT EYE' with FPS and status indicators
Video feed container shows camera standby state with reticle corners
START DETECTION button is visible, enabled and clickable
Stats panel displays all required metrics (Total Detections, Weapons, Phones, Uptime)
Detection Log panel shows 'No detections yet' initially
Dark tactical theme properly applied (#050505 background)
Barlow Condensed font used for headings as per design guidelines
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Backend-frontend integration working (stats updating from API calls)
YOLOv8n model successfully processes detection requests
